MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS RONALD TERRY, BILL MIRANDA, PHIL DOHERTY AND COMPLETE BUILDING SERVICES' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Shannon M. Gibson of Littler Mendelson (276.2509) for defendants and moving parties; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-26-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. SHANNON M. GIBSON OF LITTLER MENDELSON, TEL. NO. 276-2509 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS DEFENDANTS RONALD TERRY, BILL MIRANDA, PHIL DOHERTY AND COMPLETE BUILDING SERVICES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT IN LIGHT OF THE FILING OF THE AMENDED COMPLAINT.
